example: She felt overwhelmed by the amount of work she had to do.
zh: 感到不知所措，壓力過大
ja: 圧倒されている、手に負えない状態

example: The goods are stored in the warehouse before shipping.
We had to make some compromises to finish the project on time.
The warehouse staff checked the inbound goods carefully.
The pickers are responsible for selecting items from the shelves.
ja: ピッカー（商品を選ぶ人）

example: We must finish the report before the deadline.
Improving picking and shipping accuracy reduces customer complaints.
ja: ピッキングと出荷の正確さ

example: The company's headcount has increased this year.
Improving customer experience is key to business success.
